name: cursor-computer-use
description: Native macOS Computer Use MCP for Cursor (9 tools, Set-of-Mark screenshots, policy).

interface.shortDescription: Control native macOS apps from Cursor with accessibility + annotated screenshots
interface.longDescription: Cursor Computer Use connects Cursor to the open-computer-use native MCP server. It exposes nine desktop tools (list_apps, get_app_state, click, scroll, type_text, and more), Set-of-Mark screenshot overlays, optional Apple Vision OCR, and policy files to block password managers.
defaultPrompt: List running apps and capture get_app_state for the target app before clicking
Use element_index from the accessibility tree instead of coordinate clicks when possible
Verify UI changes with a follow-up get_app_state after each action
